name: Smaran Harihar
tagline: Senior Software Engineer  ·  Frontend & Full-Stack  ·  Agentic AI · Harness Engineering · Geospatial · Computer Vision
summary: Senior frontend and full-stack engineer (13+ years) at the leading edge of agentic AI — building the development “harness” (automated guardrails, testing, refactoring, and LLM context/knowledge graphs) that makes team-wide AI-assisted coding fast, consistent, and productive. Anchored in deep React/TypeScript/Node.js engineering and a decade-plus in GIS, now translating computer-vision and geospatial data into intuitive, high-performance interfaces for critical-infrastructure inspection.

skills.label: Agentic AI & Harness Engineering
skills.value: Claude Code, Cursor, prompt & context engineering, LLM knowledge graphs (domain grounding), AI guardrails & quality gates, Skills/workflow design, GitHub Copilot, ChatGPT

skills.label: Frontend
skills.value: React, Redux, Next.js, Styled Components, Tailwind CSS, Material UI, AntD, Fluent UI, Storybook

skills.label: Geospatial & Computer Vision
skills.value: GIS, ArcGIS JS API, layered map-based views, CV overlays (bounding boxes, segmentation masks, metadata), large image-dataset rendering

skills.label: Backend & Architecture
skills.value: Node.js, Express, Go, gRPC, ProtoBuf, microservices, clean architecture

skills.label: Testing & Build
skills.value: Unit & E2E testing, Prettier, ESLint, Webpack, Vite; Agile Scrum
